rulings.Case Title: IN RE: MTC FINANCIAL INC. DBA TRUSTEE CORPS
rulings.Calendar Matter: Claimants' (Bank Of America) Hearing On Disbursement Of Claims Of Surplus Funds
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 7, 2014, Line 1: Bank Of America's claim for Disbursement Of Surplus Funds: GRANTED. Bank of America's lien has priority over the 742 Fell Street Homeowner's Association lien. (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: NATALIA KHORUZHENKO VS. ALAN WU KONG TAN, et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 7, 2014, Line 2: PLAINTIFF NATALIA KHORUZHENKO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/Adjudication: DENIED. Plaintiff failed to show that there are no issues of material fact and that the moving party is entitled to a judgment as a matter of law. See Code of Civil Procedure, Section 437c(c). (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. POPE & POPE PROPERTIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 7, 2014, Line 3: CROSS DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT: CONTINUED to December 4, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Department 501. Moving party failed to attach a copy of the operative cross-complaint to their demurrer. See SF Local Rule 2.6C. Courtesy copies must be dropped off in Department 501 by 4 p.m. on November 24, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.

rulings.Case Title: WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. POPE & POPE PROPERTIES LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.S Motion To Strike Edward Alkhasovs First Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 7, 2014, Line 3: CROSS DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK's Motion To Strike Edward Alkhasovs First Amended Cross-Complaint: CONTINUED to December 4, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Department 501. Moving party failed to attach a copy of the operative cross-complaint to their demurrer. See SF Local Rule 2.6C. Courtesy copies must be dropped off in Department 501 by 4 p.m. on November 24, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: TRAVIS WALTMOM VS. ROBERT K. SIMPSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alt Summ Judgmnt
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 7, 2014, Line 4: PLAINTIFF TRAVIS WALTMOM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively Summary Adjudication: DENIED as there are triable issues of material fact not entitling the moving party to a judgment as a matter of law. (Code Civil Procedure, Section 437c(c).) Plaintiff failed to adequately prove each element of the causes of action. (Aguilar v. Atlantic Richfield Co. (2001) 25 Cal.4th 826.) (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN PAPPAGEORGE VS. MARTIN V MURPHY JR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Third Party Witness
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 7, 2014, Line 9: PLAINTIFF JOHN PAPPAGEORGE's Motion To Compel Third Party Witness: CONTINUED to November 12, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Department 501 to be heard concurrently with other motions. (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN PAPPAGEORGE VS. MARTIN V MURPHY JR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To: Demand For Identification And Production Of Documents To Cary Dunne, Set One; Special Interrogatories To Cary Dunne Set One; Form Interrogatories Set One; For An Order To Deem Certain Requests For Admissions Of Fact Admitted; And For Santions Against Deft
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 7, 2014, Line 9: PLAINTIFF JOHN PAPPAGEORGE's Motion To Compel Responses To Demand For Identification, production Of Documents, Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories; For An Order To Deem Certain Requests For Admissions Admitted; And For Sanctions: CONTINUED to November 12, 2014 at 9:30 AM in Department 501 to be heard concurrently with other motions. (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: ALVIN BENJAMIN CHONG VS. AARON BARTON CHONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 7, 2014, Line 5: DEFENDANT AARON CHONG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OVERRULED. This Court has proper authority over the subject matter of this action. (Harnedy v. Whitty (2003) 110 Cal.App.4th 1333.) Additionally, Plaintiff pled sufficient facts to allege standing. (Prob. Code §§ 24, 17200.) (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. KEITH ALBERT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 7, 2014, Line 6: PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION'S Motion To Enforce Settlement: GRANTED. Plaintiffs made a sufficient showing pursuant to CCP 664.6 that Defendant violated the terms of the stipulation. (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: O'BRIEN KIERNAN INVESTMENT CO. VS. CHARLES M SOUTH
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 7, 2014, Line 7: DEFENDANT CHARLES SOUTH's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: OVERRULED. Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint is in compliance with the San Francisco Rent Control Ordinance. (501/LOT)

rulings.Case Title: HK GRACE BUILDING LLC VS. GEORGINA KHAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 7, 2014, Line 8: DEFENDANT GEROGINA KHAN 'S MOTION To Quash Service Of Summons: DENIED. Plaintiff effectuated proper substitute service pursuant to CCP Section 415.20(a). (501/LOT)
